\providecommand{\matrixsummarycell}[2]{\begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{}}#1\\#2\end{tabular}}
\providecommand{\matrixsummaryfield}[1]{\makebox[0.39in][r]{#1}}
\providecommand{\matrixsummaryfour}[4]{\matrixsummaryfield{#1}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#2}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#3}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#4}}
